title: Vietnamese Pho with Cabbage
description: A refreshing twist on the classic Vietnamese noodle soup, featuring a rugged cabbage slaw.

ingredients.name: vietnamese fresh herbs (such as basil, mint, cilantro)

instructions: Bring the vegetable broth to a boil in a large pot.
Reduce heat to a simmer and add soy sauce, lime juice, honey, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Cook the pho noodles according to the package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine the shredded cabbage and grated daikon radish.
Add the chopped fresh herbs to the bowl and toss to combine.
To assemble the pho, place a portion of noodles into a bowl, then add a portion of the cabbage slaw on top.
Ladle the hot broth over the noodles and slaw.
